summary: Comprehensive backend (pytest 26/26 passing) and frontend (Expo web preview, mobile viewport 390x844) tests for Laundry POS MVP. All listed scenarios verified successfully including: JWT login for owner & cashier, wrong-password 401, dashboard stats, customers CRUD, services list/CRUD with owner/cashier RBAC, full order lifecycle (create→status→payment), Midtrans 502 graceful failure (expected with placeholder key) and 400 when paid, user registration as owner success / cashier 403, user deletion by owner. Frontend flows verified end-to-end: sign-in → owner login → dashboard KPIs → orders tab with filter chips → new-order pick customer + service → submit redirects to order detail with payment & next-status buttons → customers tab → more tab (owner sees 'Manajemen Pengguna') → logout → cashier login → cashier does NOT see 'Manajemen Pengguna'. No deprecated expo packages detected.

minor.issue: FastAPI deprecated startup/shutdown events; should migrate to lifespan context manager. Not blocking.

allow_origins=['*'] together with allow_credentials=True is invalid per CORS spec (browsers will reject credentialed requests). Currently not affecting flows because auth uses Authorization header, not cookies.

issues: Console warning: 'shadow*' style props are deprecated, use 'boxShadow' (react-native-web). Cosmetic only.
Console warning: 'props.pointerEvents is deprecated' from a child component. Cosmetic only.

action_items: (Optional) Replace @app.on_event with FastAPI lifespan handler in /app/backend/server.py.
(Optional) Tighten CORS allow_origins to known frontend domain when enabling cookie-based auth.
(Cosmetic) Migrate StyleSheet 'shadow*' props to 'boxShadow' to silence RN-Web deprecation warnings.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py keeps responses clean of Mongo _id by using projection — good.
JWT auth, role gating (require_owner) and bcrypt password hashing are correctly implemented.
Midtrans error handled with HTTP 502 and friendly detail; no 500 crash even with placeholder key.
Order number generator uses count_documents per-day prefix — acceptable for MVP; potential race under high concurrency.
seed_data_creation: Used existing seed (owner, kasir, default services, default customers). Test artifacts (TEST_*) were created and cleaned up by pytest. One additional order/customer were created by the UI submit flow and were not cleaned up (left as live data).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Use EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL=https://wash-app-3.preview.emergentagent.com. Backend tests live in /app/backend/tests/test_laundry_api.py and cover auth, dashboard, customers, services (RBAC), orders lifecycle, midtrans, user management. Midtrans is expected to return 502 with placeholder key — do NOT mark as bug. Bottom-tab navigation in Expo Router exposes role='tab' with title as accessibility name; use page.get_by_role('tab', name='Pesanan') for reliable taps.
